questionText: Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The new smartphone model comes with a built-in ___ that allows users to make contactless payments.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'You should regularly ___ your operating system to protect against security vulnerabilities.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'She stored all her vacation photos in the ___ so she could access them from any device.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The website uses ___ encryption to ensure that sensitive data transmitted between the browser and server remains private.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'Please make sure to ___ your work before closing the application so you don't lose any changes.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The developer pushed the latest code changes to the ___ repository so the team could review them.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'A ___ is a malicious program that replicates itself and spreads to other computers without the user's knowledge.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'He used a ___ to block unwanted incoming connections and protect his home network.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The tech company announced that its new laptop has a battery life of over 12 hours on a single ___.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The IT team set up a ___ network so employees could work remotely without compromising company data.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'You can use a ___ to organize your files into categories and make them easier to locate on your hard drive.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The ___ bar at the top of the browser allows you to type in a web address and navigate to different sites.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The company decided to ___ its outdated servers and replace them with more efficient cloud-based solutions.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'After the system crash, the engineers worked around the clock to ___ all the lost data from the backup.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The app requires users to enable ___ authentication, which sends a verification code to their phone.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The software engineer used a ___ environment to test new features before deploying them to the live server.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The company launched a ___ program that rewards users for identifying and reporting security flaws in its software.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The new framework offers a highly ___ architecture, allowing developers to add or remove components without disrupting the core system.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The data pipeline was redesigned to handle ___ processing, enabling real-time analysis of incoming streams.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'Developers rely on ___ versioning to track changes over time and collaborate efficiently on large codebases.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The API relies on ___ authentication tokens that expire after a short period to minimize security risks.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The platform was designed with a ___ approach, ensuring that services can be independently deployed and scaled.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The team adopted a ___ deployment strategy, gradually rolling out the update to a small subset of users before a full release.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'To improve performance, the engineers implemented ___ caching, storing frequently accessed data closer to the end user.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The company uses ___ computing to distribute processing tasks across multiple machines, improving efficiency and reliability.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The application crashed due to a ___ leak, which caused the system to run out of available memory over time.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'By implementing ___ load balancing, the infrastructure team ensured that traffic was evenly distributed across all available servers.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The IoT devices communicate using a lightweight ___ protocol designed specifically for constrained networks with low bandwidth.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The software team followed a ___ development cycle, allowing them to continuously integrate and deliver updates to production.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The server uses ___ hashing to store passwords in a way that is computationally expensive to reverse.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The engineers introduced ___ testing to automatically verify that new code changes do not break previously working features.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The application's ___ layer was refactored to decouple business logic from data access, improving maintainability.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The cybersecurity analyst identified a ___ injection vulnerability that could allow attackers to manipulate database queries.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The team used ___ diagrams to model the interactions between objects in the software system before writing any code.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The startup's entire infrastructure runs on ___ containers, making it trivial to replicate the production environment locally.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The ___ pattern was implemented to ensure that only one instance of the configuration manager exists throughout the application's lifecycle.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The system's resilience was enhanced by applying ___ engineering principles, deliberately introducing failures to test recovery mechanisms.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The data warehouse leverages ___ processing to handle massive analytical queries by breaking them into parallel tasks across a cluster.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'To prevent ___ attacks, the API enforces strict rate limiting and validates the origin of every cross-domain request.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The platform adopted an ___ architecture, in which components communicate via events rather than direct method calls, improving scalability.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The search engine uses an ___ index to allow full-text queries to run in near-constant time regardless of dataset size.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The team applied ___ decomposition to break down a large monolith into independent services aligned with business capabilities.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'To guarantee ___ consistency across distributed nodes, the database uses a two-phase commit protocol for critical transactions.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The compiler performs ___ analysis to detect variables that are assigned but never used, flagging potential logic errors at build time.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The security team implemented ___ obfuscation to make it harder for reverse engineers to understand the application's proprietary logic.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The cloud provider's ___ agreement guarantees 99.99% uptime, with financial penalties imposed if availability falls below that threshold.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The observability stack was extended with ___ tracing to follow a single request as it propagated through dozens of microservices.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The system's ___ backpressure mechanism prevents producers from overwhelming consumers by dynamically throttling the message ingestion rate.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The team configured a ___ circuit breaker to automatically halt outgoing calls to a failing dependency and return a cached fallback response.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The new language model was trained using ___ feedback from human evaluators to better align its outputs with user intentions.'
Preencha o espaço em branco: 'The engineers used ___ profiling to identify hotspots in the application and prioritize optimization efforts where they would have the greatest impact.'
